member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the AuditLog entity.

member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the EntityEvent outbox entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Audit.ImportJobConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the ImportJob entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Audit.SearchIndexConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the SearchIndex entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Company.CompanyConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the Company tenant aggregate.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Company.EmployeeConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the Employee entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Company.MasterLookupConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration mapping for the MasterLookup entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Company.PayrollComponentConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core Fluent API configuration for the entity. Maps to the company.PayrollComponents table as specified in Database.md §5.6.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Company.TaxBracketConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the TaxBracket configuration ruleset entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Payroll.PayrollRunConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the PayrollRun aggregate root entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployeeConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the PayrollRunEmployee entity.

member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the PayrollRunEmployeeTrace entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Payroll.PayrollRunLineItemConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the PayrollRunLineItem entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Configurations.Payroll.PayrollRunStateHistoryConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core mapping configuration for the PayrollRunStateHistory audit entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext
member.summary: Entity Framework Core database context for the Fiji Enterprise Payroll System. Implements transactional control and automatically applies auditable interceptors.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.CurrentCompanyId
member.summary: Gets the current resolved company tenant ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext})
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class. Used for EF migrations and design-time tooling.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext},FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.AuditableEntityInterceptor,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class with interceptors and tenant provider.
Initialises a new instance of the class with interceptors, audit interceptor, and tenant provider.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollComponents
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll components DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.Companies
member.summary: Gets or sets the companies DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.MasterLookups
member.summary: Gets or sets the master lookups DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.Employees
member.summary: Gets or sets the employees DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.TaxBrackets
member.summary: Gets or sets the tax brackets DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollRuns
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll runs DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollRunEmployees
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll run employees DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollRunEmployeeTraces
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll run employee traces DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollRunLineItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll run line items DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.PayrollRunStateHistories
member.summary: Gets or sets the payroll run state histories DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.AuditLogs
member.summary: Gets or sets the audit logs DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.EntityEvents
member.summary: Gets or sets the entity events (transactional outbox) DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.ImportJobs
member.summary: Gets or sets the import jobs DbSet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.SearchIndexes
member.summary: Gets or sets the search indexes DbSet.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins a database transaction asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.CommitTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the current database transaction.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext.RollbackTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rolls back the current database transaction.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Extension methods to register all Persistence layer services (EF Core DbContext, repositories, unit of work, and interceptors) with the dependency injection container. Called from the WPF composition root.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.DependencyInjection.AddPersistence(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Registers database connection, EF Core interceptors, and repositories in the DI container.
member.param: The service collection to register into.
The SQL Server database connection string.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.AuditableEntityInterceptor
member.summary:
EF Core SaveChanges interceptor that automatically stamps audit fields (CreatedAt, CreatedBy, ModifiedAt, ModifiedBy) on all instances before they are written to the database.
This interceptor is registered in and applied globally to the ApplicationDbContext.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.AuditableEntityInterceptor.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.ICurrentUserAccessor)
member.summary: Initialises the interceptor with user context access.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.ICurrentUserAccessor
member.summary: Minimal accessor interface allowing the interceptor to obtain the current username without taking a full dependency on ICurrentUserService. Implemented in the Infrastructure layer by the session service.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.ICurrentUserAccessor.Username
member.summary: Current username. Never null; defaults to "System" for background tasks.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.AuditLogInterceptor
member.summary: EF Core interceptor that captures entity modifications (added, modified, deleted) and domain events, serialises the audit log and publishes the domain events to the outbox table in the same transaction.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.AuditLogInterceptor.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICorrelationContext,FijiPayroll.Persistence.Interceptors.ICurrentUserAccessor,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IEventBus)
member.summary: Initialises the interceptor.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.EmployeeRepository
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the IEmployeeRepository.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.ImportJobRepository
member.summary: EF Core repository implementation for the entity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.ImportJobRepository.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initializes the repository with the DbContext.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.MasterLookupRepository
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the IMasterLookupRepository.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.MasterLookupRepository.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initializes repository dependencies.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.PayrollComponentRepository
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the interface. Provides data access operations for entities.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.PayrollComponentRepository.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.PayrollRunRepository
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the IPayrollRunRepository.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.SearchIndexRepository
member.summary: EF Core repository implementation for the entity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.SearchIndexRepository.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initializes the repository with the DbContext.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.TaxBracketRepository
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the ITaxBracketRepository.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.UnitOfWork
member.summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of the interface. Orchestrates transaction boundaries and coordinates repository changes.
Initialises a new instance of the class.
Initialises a new instance of the class with ImportJobs.
Initialises a new instance of the class with ImportJobs and SearchIndexes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Repositories.UnitOfWork.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the database context.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.EmployeeSeeder
member.summary: Idempotent database seeder for employees.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.EmployeeSeeder.SeedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Seeds default employees if none exist.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.PayrollComponentSeeder
member.summary: Handles database seeding for standard Fiji payroll components. Executes only when the database is first created or during migration bootstrapping.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.PayrollComponentSeeder.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Persistence.Context.ApplicationDbContext)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.PayrollComponentSeeder.SeedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Seeds the standard payroll components if none exist.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Seeders.TaxBracketSeeder.SeedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Seeds the tax brackets if none exist.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Services.ReferenceDataCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory caching implementation for Reference Data. Automatically handles sliding cache expirations and multi-tenant key mappings. Resides in Persistence to have direct query access to ApplicationDbContext.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Persistence.Services.ReferenceDataCache.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Persistence.Services.ReferenceDataCache})
member.summary: Initializes the reference data cache.
